title: euphrasia longifolia
intro: Euphrasia longifolia, also known as Eyebright, is a perennial flowering plant native to Europe, Asia, and North America, with its leaves and stems being used in herbal medicine. It has been traditionally used for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which help to soothe and protect the eyes, as well as for its expectorant properties, which aid in relieving respiratory issues. The health benefits of Euphrasia longifolia include its ability to reduce inflammation and alleviate symptoms associated with conjunctivitis, sinusitis, and bronchitis, making it a popular herbal remedy for respiratory and eye health issues. Euphrasia longifolia can be consumed as a tea, taken in capsule or tablet form, or applied topically as an eye drops or cream, depending on the desired health benefit.
